Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}{f 4 8 0}Combat Characteristics are passive effects that will automatically activate during battle. Your party members each have their own unique Combat Characteristics.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}{f 4 8 0}Select STATS from the {f 1 3 112} menu for further details on a party member's Combat Characteristics under Theurgy.[n]{f 1 1}
